\tzpentry{ID4149}{Chemical Potential Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4149 introduces Chemical Potential Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$h_{\mu\nu} = A\psi^* \partial_\mu \partial_\nu \psi$
\]
